channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: TikTok ban in effect. The app goes dark for millions in the U.S. and removed from app stores
item.description: Millions of TikTok users in the United States are no longer able to watch videos on the social media platform as a federal ban on the immensely popular app takes effect.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Trump Launches Meme Coin Amid Controversy - Cryptocurrency News
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump launches a new cryptocurrency token, sparking controversy over its potential impact on his net worth and influence.
item.dc:creator: Alan Suderman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How to stop robocalls on your flip phone
item.description: Flip phones are harder to block spam calls from, but it's not impossible. Kurt the "CyberGuy" explains how to stop incoming robocalls on your flip phone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How TikTok grew from a fun app for teens into a potential national security threat
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — If it feels like TikTok has been around forever, that's probably because it has, at least if you're measuring via internet time.
item.dc:creator: DAVID HAMILTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: TikTok says it’s in the process of restoring service to US users
item.description: TikTok’s app was removed from prominent app stores on Saturday just before a federal law that would have banned the popular social media platform was scheduled to go into effect.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: With a US ban on TikTok hours away, Trump says he 'most likely' will grant an extension
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump says he “most likely” will give TikTok 90 more days to work out a deal that would allow the popular video-sharing platform to avoid a U.S. ban.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: For TikTok users, mourning, frustration and clinging to hope as TikTok ban looms
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The U.S. is inching closer and closer to a potential TikTok ban — with the nation's highest court upholding a law that's set to halt new downloads of the app starting Sunday.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS and MAE ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Supreme Court upholds TikTok ban. No one knows what comes next
item.description: In a unanimous ruling, the Supreme Court voted Friday to uphold a law that will require TikTok to shut down as soon as Sunday, unless its Chinese parent company, ByteDance, agrees to sell the app. The court agreed with the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Issie Lapowsky, Fast Company

item.title: TikTok refugees are pouring to Xiaohongshu. Here's what you need to know about the RedNote app
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As the fate of TikTok hangs in the balance, U.S. TikTok users are flocking to the Chinese social media app Xiaohongshu, also called RedNote – making it the top downloaded app in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: FU TING and DAVID COHEN, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Who could buy TikTok? Only a few parties are serious about offering
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The supremely popular TikTok could be banned on Jan. 19 under a federal law that forces the video sharing platform to divest itself from its China-based parent company, ByteDance, or shut down its U.S. operations.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Bitcoin soars past $100,000 ahead of possible early action on crypto by Trump
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The price of bitcoin topped $100,000 again early Friday as a pumped up cryptocurrency industry expects early action by Donald Trump when he's sworn in as president next week.
item.dc:creator: ALAN SUDERMAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: President Biden’s new executive order aims to bolster national security
item.description: President Joe Biden issued an executive order on Thursday aimed at strengthening the nation’s cybersecurity and making it easier to go after foreign adversaries or hacking groups that try to compromise U.S. internet and telecommunication systems.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Easterly hails CISA’s ‘world-class’ talent in final address
item.description: CISA grew rapidly during the Biden administration, recruiting technical experts to lead key initiatives like "secure by design" and cyberthreat hunting teams. The post Easterly hails CISA’s ‘world-class’ talent in final address first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Taiwanese chipmaker TSMC posts 57% surge in profit thanks to the AI boom
item.description: HONG KONG (AP) — Taiwan computer chip maker TSMC reported Thursday that its profit in the last quarter rose 57%, buoyed by the artificial intelligence boom. The world’s biggest semiconductor manufacturer reported a net profit of 374.7 billion new Taiwan dollars ($11.4 billion), higher than expected.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Kazakhstan’s AI-Powered Prisons: Setting a New Standard for Safety and Efficiency
item.description: Technology innovations have made the digital transformation of public services essential to enhancing safety, efficiency, and accountability.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Fox will stream next month's Super Bowl for free on Tubi
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fox will stream the Super Bowl on Tubi for the first time, giving streamers and cord cutters a chance to watch the big game on Feb. 9 for free. Tubi was acquired by Fox Corporation in 2020. It is a free, ad-supported streaming service.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How to expedite your CMMC process
item.description: The Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification rule is now final, yet we still see organizations seeking certification waiting to implement the requirements. The post How to expedite your CMMC process first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Biden's big semiconductor law will ramp up US chip production -- but at a high cost, report finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A sweeping 2022 law, touted by President Joe Biden as a way to revive U.S. manufacturing of semiconductors and reduce the country’s reliance on foreign-made computer chips, will “sharply increase production’’ of semiconductors in the United States.
item.dc:creator: PAUL WISEMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cisco offers AI application visibility, access control, threat defense
item.description: Cisco has rolled out a service that promises to protect enterprise AI development projects with visibility, access control, threat defense, and other safeguards.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft adds ‘pay-as-you-go’ access for AI agents with M365 Copilot Chat
item.description: Microsoft has added a “pay-as-you-go” option to access AI agents alongside its free M365 Copilot Chat plan.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Windows 11: A guide to the updates
item.description: A Windows launch isn’t the end a process — it’s really just the beginning. Microsoft continually works on improving Windows 11 by fixing bugs, releasing security patches, and occasionally adding new features.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: SEC sues Elon Musk, saying he didn't disclose Twitter ownership on time before buying it
item.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission has sued billionaire Elon Musk, saying he failed to disclose his ownership of Twitter stock in a timely manner in early 2022, before buying the social media site.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Angular team unveils strategy for 2025
item.description: The 2025 strategy document for Google’s Angular web development framework calls for enhancing the developer experience with capabilities such as zoneless change detection and signal-based forms, and making developer adoption of new features easier with schematics.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg will cohost reception with Republican billionaires for Trump inauguration
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg is cohosting a reception with billionaire Republican donors next week for Donald Trump’s inauguration, the latest sign of the Facebook founder's embrace of the president-elect.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER and COLLEEN LONG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Court lets Tennessee porn site age verification law take effect as Texas law goes to Supreme Court
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — A panel of appeals judges has ruled that Tennessee can begin enforcing a law that requires pornographic websites to verify their visitors’ age as the First Amendment debate rises to the U.S. Supreme Court this week for oral arguments over a similar Texas law.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN MATTISE, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: A CSO’s perspective: 8 cyber predictions for 2025
item.description: As we step into 2025, the cyberthreat landscape is once again more dynamic and challenging than the year before. In 2024, we witnessed a remarkable acceleration in cyberattacks of all types, many fueled by advancements in generative AI. For security leaders, the stakes are higher than ever.
item.dc:creator: Network World
